name: Black light wave
short_description: This is a casual and relaxing game based on the classic fable of a turtle and rabbit race
detailed_description:
This is a casual and relaxing game adapted from the classic fable of a turtle and rabbit race, telling the story of a turtle and a rabbit competing. The story begins, and the turtle and rabbit decide to have a running competition. The rabbit is very confident, while the turtle is very firm. Guess which one of them won? Players help the little rabbit overcome traps, continue to move forward, and ultimately win the game. The game is simple and the graphics are exquisite. Come and give it a try!
Gameplay:
You need to manipulate the character to constantly move forward and avoid obstacles
Operation method
Move Left=A
Move Right=D
Jump=Space
